profileForm.caregiverAlertsSubtitle: Send an SMS or email when a dose is missed.
profileForm.deleteConfirmMessage: This permanently deletes "{{name}}" and all their medications and history.

caregiverAlert.title: Missed dose alert
caregiverAlert.cannotSendBody: Unable to open a messaging app. Please verify the caregiver contact in profile settings.

onboardingPhone.title: Your phone number
onboardingPhone.body: Stored only on your device — never shared. Used to link this profile to you so family members can identify who set up their reminders.
onboardingPhone.label: Phone number

family.title: Family
family.noMembersSubtitle: Add a family member to manage their medicines from this device.
family.deleteConfirmMessage: This permanently deletes {{name}}'s medicines and history. This cannot be undone.

familyForm.phoneHint: Stored locally — never sent or shared

viewingAs.bannerA11y: Currently viewing {{name}}'s medicines. Tap to return to your own profile.

welcome.title: Never miss a dose
welcome.body: Photograph your prescription and MedMinder sets up reminders automatically — tracking every dose and alerting you when it's time to refill.

name.title: What should we call you?
name.body: We'll use your name in daily greetings. It stays on your device and is never shared.

notifications.title: Reminders that actually help
notifications.body: MedMinder nudges you before each dose and checks in if you haven't marked it taken — so you never lose track, even on busy days.

camera.title: Scan your prescriptions
camera.body: The fastest way to add medicines is to photograph your prescription. Your images are processed on-device and are never stored or shared.

disclaimer.title: One important thing
disclaimer.body: Please read the following before you continue.
disclaimer.text: MedMinder helps you remember your medicines. It does not provide medical advice. AI reading of a prescription can be wrong — always check the details against your actual prescription and your pharmacist before relying on them.

appLock.screenSubtitle: Authenticate to access your health data.
appLock.screenA11y: MedMinder app lock screen. Authenticate to continue.
appLock.enableConfirmBody: You will need Face ID, Touch ID, or your device passcode to open the app.
appLock.biometricNotAvailable: Biometrics or passcode not set up on this device. Enable a screen lock in your device Settings first.

settings.title: Settings
settings.appLockSubtitle: Require biometrics or passcode to open the app
settings.exportDataSubtitle: Download your full history as JSON
settings.resetSettingsSubtitle: Restore every setting to its default value
settings.clearDataSubtitle: Permanently delete all medications and history for this profile
settings.privacyPolicySubtitle: How your health data is stored and protected
settings.testNotificationsSubtitle: Fire a test dose reminder, inspect scheduled queue
settings.resetConfirmBody: This restores every setting to its default value. Your medication data is not affected.
settings.clearConfirmBody: This permanently deletes all medications and history for the active profile. This cannot be undone.
settings.exportFailedBody: Could not export your data. Please try again.

notificationSettings.title: Reminders
notificationSettings.leadTimeHint: A heads-up fires this many minutes before the scheduled dose time.
notificationSettings.leadTimeA11y: Minutes before dose to fire the lead reminder
notificationSettings.reRemindHint: If you don't respond, another reminder fires every N minutes.
notificationSettings.maxRemindersHint: After this many reminders the dose is auto-marked missed (e.g. 24 = 2 h at 5-min intervals).
notificationSettings.maxRemindersA11y: Maximum number of reminders before dose is auto-marked missed
notificationSettings.snoozeDurationA11y: Minutes a snoozed reminder is delayed
notificationSettings.quietHoursHint: Reminders during this window are shifted to the end time.
notificationSettings.soundHint: Play a sound with each reminder.
notificationSettings.voiceAnnounceHint: Uses text-to-speech to read upcoming doses — useful hands-free. VoiceControl (iOS) or Voice Access (Android) can then confirm doses by voice.
notificationSettings.resetDefaultsA11y: Reset all notification settings to defaults

speech.allDoneToday: All doses taken for today. Well done.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.summaryBody: All your health data — medications, schedules, dose history, phone numbers — lives only on this device in a local database. Nothing is ever sent to any server, cloud, or third party. MedMinder works entirely offline.
privacy.section1Title: What is stored on your device
privacy.section1Body:
• Medicine names, doses, schedules, and course durations
• Dose history (taken, missed, skipped)
• Profile names, relationship labels, and phone numbers you enter
• Notification and app settings
• Prescription images are processed on-device with on-device OCR and immediately discarded — never uploaded
privacy.section2Body:
• No analytics, crash reports, or usage data
• No account or login — not even an email address
• No advertising identifiers
• No data is ever uploaded to any server
privacy.section3Body: Any phone numbers you add to a profile are stored only in the local database on this device. They are never sent to any server, never used to send SMS or make calls, and never shared with any third party. You can remove them at any time by editing the profile.
privacy.section4Body: When you scan a prescription, the image is processed on-device using ML Kit. The image is never uploaded to any cloud service or external server. Extracted text is used only to pre-fill the medication form and is not retained after the session.
privacy.section5Body: The optional app lock uses your device's built-in biometrics (Face ID, Touch ID, fingerprint) or passcode. Your biometric data is handled entirely by the operating system — MedMinder never sees or stores it.
privacy.section6Body: The 'Export data' feature writes a JSON file to your device's Documents folder. You control where the file goes from there. MedMinder only creates the file — it does not transmit it.
privacy.section7Body: This app collects no data for tracking purposes. Data stored on-device is not shared with any third party. The app does not link health data to any identity or device identifier for advertising or analytics.
privacy.section8Body: File an issue on the project's GitHub repository or use the contact address listed in the App Store.
